title: Diagnose and repair light vehicle engines
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Diagnose and repair light vehicle engines demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to diagnose and repair engine

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Identify required information for diagnosis activity 1.3 Analyse diagnostic options and source testing strategy to identify cause of fault using workplace and manufacturer procedures 1.4 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with diagnose and repair activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.5 Identify tools and equipment required for testing strategy and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Identify required information for diagnosis activity 1.3 Analyse diagnostic options and source testing strategy to identify cause of fault using workplace and manufacturer procedures 1.4 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with diagnose and repair activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.5 Identify tools and equipment required for testing strategy and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Identify required information for diagnosis activity 1.3 Analyse diagnostic options and source testing strategy to identify cause of fault using workplace and manufacturer procedures 1.4 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with diagnose and repair activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.5 Identify tools and equipment required for testing strategy and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to diagnose and repair engine

elements.title: Diagnose engine

pcs.text: Implement diagnostic tests set out in testing strategy according to manufacturer and workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety requirements2.2 Identify cause of fault through analysis of diagnostic test results2.3 Confirm and report cause of fault according to workplace procedures2.4 Develop and report recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement diagnostic tests set out in testing strategy according to manufacturer and workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety requirements2.2 Identify cause of fault through analysis of diagnostic test results2.3 Confirm and report cause of fault according to workplace procedures2.4 Develop and report recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement diagnostic tests set out in testing strategy according to manufacturer and workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety requirements2.2 Identify cause of fault through analysis of diagnostic test results2.3 Confirm and report cause of fault according to workplace procedures2.4 Develop and report recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Diagnose engine

elements.title: Dismantle engine

pcs.text: Identify tools and equipment required to dismantle engine and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures3.2 Dismantle engine, clean and inspect components according to workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Measure and compare components against manufacturer specifications3.4 Confirm recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify tools and equipment required to dismantle engine and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures3.2 Dismantle engine, clean and inspect components according to workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Measure and compare components against manufacturer specifications3.4 Confirm recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify tools and equipment required to dismantle engine and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures3.2 Dismantle engine, clean and inspect components according to workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Measure and compare components against manufacturer specifications3.4 Confirm recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Dismantle engine

elements.title: Repair and re-assemble engine

pcs.text: Identify required information for repair activity 4.2 Identify tools, equipment and materials required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures 4.3 Carry out repairs according to workplace and manufacturer procedures, manufacturer specifications, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements4.4 Re-assemble engine according to workplace and manufacturer procedures, manufacturer specifications, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements4.5 Carry out post-repair testing according to workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify required information for repair activity 4.2 Identify tools, equipment and materials required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures 4.3 Carry out repairs according to workplace and manufacturer procedures, manufacturer specifications, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements4.4 Re-assemble engine according to workplace and manufacturer procedures, manufacturer specifications, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements4.5 Carry out post-repair testing according to workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify required information for repair activity 4.2 Identify tools, equipment and materials required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures 4.3 Carry out repairs according to workplace and manufacturer procedures, manufacturer specifications, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements4.4 Re-assemble engine according to workplace and manufacturer procedures, manufacturer specifications, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements4.5 Carry out post-repair testing according to workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Repair and re-assemble engine

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
